case_title: CHASE BANK USA, N.A. VS. APOSTLE L. DAVIS et al

docket_entries.description: DISCOVERY 302, DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A.'S NOTICE OF HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION. APPEARANCES: APOSTLE DAVIS (724.5300) DISCUSSED AND THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND CONTINUED THE MATTER TO JANUARY 5, 2011 AT 9:00 AM. DEFENDANT TO SUBMIT COPIES OF CHECKS TO THE COURT FOR REVIEW, AND SUBMIT SAME TO PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL WITH NOTICE OF THE NEW HEARING DATE. ORDER SIGNED REGARDING THE CONTINUANCE. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD; NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption; Notice Of Opposition To Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Jan-05-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

APPEARANCES: Apostle Davis, deft in propria persona with friend Theodora Mays; no other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED. FUNDS DEPOSITED INTO ACCOUNT ARE EXEMPT: FAMILY LEAVE ACT, SOCIAL SECURITY AND STATE DISABILITY. Order signed in open court. Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Not reported

Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption; Notice Of Opposition To Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Dec-23-2010 Continued To Jan-05-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A.'S NOTICE OF HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION. Appearances: Apostle Davis (724.5300) defendant appearing in propria persona with friend Theodora Mays. No other appearances. Discussed and the court vacated its tentative ruling and continued the matter to January 5, 2011 at 9:00 am. Defendant to submit copies of checks to the court for review, and submit same to plaintiff's counsel with notice of the new hearing date. Order signed regarding the continuance. Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Not reported
